action.description: May operations release refrigerated lot NRC-31 after a temperature excursion alert?

context.action_boundary: May operations release refrigerated lot NRC-31 after a temperature excursion alert?
context.anomaly_observed: A temperature excursion alert remains visible, so stability evidence must match lot, temperature ceiling, duration, and release path.
context.explanation_summary: Exposure duration is 49 minutes but STAB-NRC-031 only covers up to 45 minutes.

internal_documents.content: Release request REL-NRC-2026-031 moves lot NRC-31 to customer shipment after a recorded excursion of 11.8C for 49 minutes.
Excursion alert remains visible for lot NRC-31 and requires stability evidence before shipment.

Stability addendum STAB-NRC-031 covers lot NRC-31, product family NRC refrigerated reagent, maximum 12.0C exposure, duration up to 45 minutes, and customer shipment release path; approved before release.
Implementation note says many NRC lots share the same refrigerated product-family prefix; prefix alone is not release evidence.

policy_documents.content: Temperature excursion release is complete only when stability evidence matches lot, maximum temperature, exposure duration, product family, and release path before shipment.
policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
